upcoming.title: Women in E-Mobility Networking Session - A side event of the KPLC E-Mobility Conference 2026
upcoming.description: Edna will be sharing her journey from engineering Kenya's roads at Kenya Urban Roads Authority, to sustainable transport at UN-Habitat (United Nations Human Settlements Programme), to running a think tank focused on climate and socioeconomic transformation through transport

upcoming.title: Building sustainable road safety systems for Africa: from data to implementation and ownership
upcoming.description: Dr. Anteneh is attending the AfroSAFE Annual Conference in Lusaka, Zambia, and teaching in the traffic safety course on the topic of Safe Infrastructure.

upcoming.title: Urban Freight and Last-Mile Logistics: Policy Solutions for Africa's Congested Cities
upcoming.description: An invitation-only roundtable for urban planners, logistics operators, and transport ministry officials to discuss regulatory and infrastructure solutions for urban freight congestion across West Africa's megacities. Invitation only — contact us to express interest.

upcoming.title: The Annual Transport Futures Lecture: Infrastructure, Equity, and the African City
upcoming.description: Our annual public lecture, open to all. This year's lecturer is Prof. Vanessa Watson (University of Cape Town) speaking on planning for informality — why Africa's cities need new frameworks, not borrowed ones.

past.title: Annual Lecture: The Political Economy of African Transport Finance
Roundtable: EV Charging Infrastructure for African Cities
